nodeIdMap.literal: "select *#(lf),concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_MANAGER_QUOTED,'-',''))), MONTHID) as AGENT_KEY#(lf),concat((UPPER(REPLACE(CLIENT_DIRECTOR,'-',''))), MONTHID) as CD_AGENT_KEY#(lf)#(lf)from V_OIP_ENT_2022"
